name: ops-core-next-ai-proposed
goal: Advance FloorConnector operational continuity across Project Workspace, CrewBoard field handoff, and customer-safe portal trust without schema changes.
rationale: Template fallback selected high-value operational strides from current docs and wave context while preserving canonical records and human approval.
productStrideCriteria: Avoids duplicate models and module silos

streams.name: project-readiness-stride-v1
streams.productOutcome: Tighten Project Workspace readiness and next-action continuity over existing project, estimate, contract, job, invoice, and payment records.

streams.name: crewboard-field-handoff-stride-v1
streams.productOutcome: Improve CrewBoard to field execution handoff clarity using canonical jobs, job assignments, daily logs, field notes, and project context.

streams.name: portal-operational-trust-stride-v1
streams.productOutcome: Clarify customer-safe portal continuity across project, contract, invoice, payment, and shared document review paths.
